features.name: sequential logic with reset signal for formal initialization
features.description: Code should include sequential logic (counter) with a reset signal that is used with fminit -seq command to initialize it to a sequence starting from 0

features.name: fminit sequence starting at zero
features.description: Code should include a reset signal used with fminit -seq rst 0,1 where the sequence starts at 0 and increments, triggering an out_of_range bug
